title: As a Man Thinketh
author: James Allen
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A single head silhouette in profile (left-facing), hairline. Inside the head, a brain-shape region with a single red glowing dot — the seed thought. The word 'seed' would fit. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Head profile facing left -->
    <path d="M 0 -300 Q 200 -340 240 -200 Q 280 -80 240 60 Q 200 160 60 200 L 60 280 L 100 320 L 0 340 L -40 320 L 0 300 Z" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <!-- A small ear -->
    <ellipse cx="180" cy="60" rx="14" ry="22" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <!-- An eye dot -->
    <circle cx="140" cy="-100" r="4" fill="#4c4c4c"/>
    <!-- Brain curve inside the head -->
    <path d="M 100 -240 Q 160 -220 200 -160 Q 220 -100 200 -40 Q 180 20 140 40 Q 100 60 80 100" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" opacity="0.7"/>
    <!-- A second brain wave (parallel) -->
    <path d="M 60 -220 Q 100 -180 120 -100 Q 100 -20 80 60 Q 60 100 40 120" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" fill="none" opacity="0.4"/>
    <!-- The single red dot (the seed thought) -->
    <circle cx="160" cy="-160" r="14" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Red glow -->
    <circle cx="160" cy="-160" r="30" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <circle cx="160" cy="-160" r="50" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.2"/>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">A SEED · A HARVEST</text>
</svg>
rationale: A single head in profile, facing left, hairline outline. Inside the head: a faint brain-shape curve in ash, and a single red 14px filled circle with two faint red glow rings. The red dot is the thought — the seed. Title 320px italic, two lines, weight 300. The composition is a head, a thought, and the rest is silence.
